title: Coleataenia longifolia
taxonomy: Coleataenia longifolia belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It is a type of grass and its classification is further divided into the subfamily Bambusoideae and the tribe Andropogoneae. The genus Coleataenia is a type of grass native to the Americas. Coleataenia longifolia is a perennial grass that grows in a variety of habitats. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Coleataenia longifolia.
